name: Todd Transit Care
recent_news: No web footprint found for 'Todd Transit Care' at 4588 N 23rd St, Milwaukee. A separate Todd Transit Inc (Cudahy/Muskego WI, est. 1973) is a freight/trucking carrier with ~55 trucks serving N. Illinois and S. Wisconsin and is unrelated to school/special-needs student transport.
fit_notes: Likely 1-2 person micro-operator with no confirmed school-bus footprint; not a viable Summit tuck-in. The similarly named Todd Transit Inc is freight/cargo, not student transport.

name: Twenty Four Hour Limousine Svc
recent_news: No web footprint or news found. Name and SIC suggest a sole-proprietor limousine/livery operator in Milwaukee, not a school-bus contractor; special_needs flag in source data likely reflects livery/NEMT-style work rather than yellow-bus or SPED contracts.
fit_notes: Micro limo operator; not a school-bus platform target. Out of scope for Summit tuck-in strategy.

name: VIP Limousine Svc
recent_news: No web footprint for the Lenox St, Milwaukee location. Wisconsin-based 'VIP Limousine' (viplimowi.com) is an Appleton-based luxury limo for weddings/Packers/Brewers games, not student transport, and not at this address.
fit_notes: Likely a 1-2 driver limo/livery operation; not a yellow-bus or SPED contractor. Not a Summit tuck-in candidate.

name: Xman Express LLC
recent_news: No identifiable web presence; not found in Wisconsin DOT contractor lists or news. Two-person LLC at a North Milwaukee residential/office address; nature of service (school vs. courier vs. NEMT) not confirmed.
fit_notes: Sub-scale micro-operator with no confirmed school-bus footprint. Not a viable Summit tuck-in.

name: Medvan
recent_news: Listed in Oklahoma City medical-transport directory as 'Local Medical Transport / Non-Emergency Medical Transport' only. No school-district contracts or SPED routes referenced. No M&A activity found.
fit_notes: Pure NEMT micro-operator (2 employees, ~$135K revenue); not a school-bus or SPED student-transport contractor. Out of scope for Summit tuck-in.
